name: Remove the dead showParentHome prop + branch (home routing already migrated to home.tsx)
description: Home routing already migrated to home.tsx:164 (ParentHomeScreen when navigationContract.home.screen==='FamilyHome', else LearnerScreen showParentHome={false}). Prop is now dead: both call sites hardcode false, the LearnerScreen branch (:506) never runs. Approved cut: full removal (3 source files + 4 test refs). A 'deleted concept' cleanup (cite feedback_audit_check_deleted_concepts in the commit). NOT on the identity cutover surface.
acceptanceCriteria: showParentHome removed from LearnerScreenProps, its default, and the dead branch at LearnerScreen.tsx:506; the showParentHome={false} suppressions at home.tsx:170 and own-learning.tsx:42 removed; 4 test references cleaned; mobile typecheck + LearnerScreen-related tests green; zero behavior change (no flag combination runs the branch).
